title: zanthoxylum monophyllum
intro: Zanthoxylum monophyllum, also known as the Taiwanese prickly ash, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, characterized by its unique, prickly stems and aromatic leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum monophyllum include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum monophyllum, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, have been used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
